subcodes.first_line: O my kind friends! In the world of humanity there are few enterprises as fruitful as the Golestan Company [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان من در عالم بشر تاسیساتی مثمر ثمر مانند شرکت گلستان کمتر است
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
